name: Nicotinamide riboside
summary: Nicotinamide riboside is tracked for Acts as an NAD+ precursor affecting cellular energy metabolism and sirtuin-linked pathways with conservative evidence framing. Treat dosing and outcomes as review-gated unless PMID-backed human evidence is present.

safetyNotes: Mild GI upset, headache, or flushing possible; long-term clinical outcome safety is still limited.
